# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: 's3://bucket/artifact.jar')
        string(name: 'PRODUCTION_SERVER', defaultValue: 'production-server.com')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_USER', defaultValue: 'deploy-user')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_KEY', defaultValue: 'deploy-key')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactUrl = params.ARTIFACT_URL
                    def artifactFile = "artifact.jar"

                    if (artifactUrl.startsWith('s3:')) {
                        sh "aws s3 cp $artifactUrl $artifactFile"
                    } else if (artifactUrl.startsWith('artifactory:')) {
                        sh "jfrog rt download $artifactUrl $artifactFile"
                    } else {
                        sh "wget $artifactUrl -O $artifactFile"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production Server') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def productionServer = params.PRODUCTION_SERVER
                    def deployUser = params.DEPLOY_USER
                    def deployKey = params.DEPLOY_KEY

                    ssh(productionServer, "sudo bash -c 'cp artifact.jar /path/to/production/server'")
                    ssh(productionServer, "sudo bash -c 'chown $deployUser:$deployUser /path/to/production/server/artifact.jar'")
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
